steps.title: Create inquiry
steps.explanation: Creates the inquiry anchor for the lifecycle.
steps.dbImpact: Inserts Inquiry row + links GuestProfile.

steps.title: Create entry (starts at S1)
steps.explanation: Creates an Entry and Segment(1) at S1.
steps.dbImpact: Inserts Entry + Segment + TraceEvent(ENTRY_CREATED).

steps.title: Run availability search and persist configuration
steps.explanation: S1 availability search produces an AvailabilityConfiguration and results including DEFICIENT annotations.
steps.dbImpact: Inserts AvailabilityConfiguration(resultSet, searchCriteria).

steps.title: Select preferred option on configuration
steps.explanation: Preferred option selection is the key exit evidence from S1.
steps.dbImpact: Updates AvailabilityConfiguration.optionSelected; inserts TraceEvent(CONFIGURATION_SELECTED).

steps.title: Progress S1→S2
steps.explanation: Seals preferred AvailabilityConfiguration and advances Entry stage.
steps.dbImpact: Atomic update: Entry.currentStage=S2 and AvailabilityConfiguration.sealedAt set.

steps.title: Create quotation (DRAFT)
steps.explanation: Creates initial quotation round at S2.
steps.dbImpact: Inserts Quotation(state=DRAFT).

steps.title: Send quotation (DRAFT→SENT)
steps.explanation: Sending seals the quotation and registers timers for validity/ack tracking (TimerRecord shim).
steps.dbImpact: Updates Quotation; inserts TimerRecord entries tied to quotationId payload.

steps.title: Accept quotation (SENT→ACCEPTED)
steps.explanation: Acceptance closes the quotation loop required for S2 exit.
steps.dbImpact: Updates Quotation.acceptedAt/acceptedBy; cancels TimerRecord rows for that quotationId.

steps.title: Progress S2→S3
steps.explanation: Moves into Reservation Setup with accepted quotation evidence.
steps.dbImpact: Updates Entry.currentStage=S3.

steps.title: Create provisional folio + billing model transition + proforma invoice
steps.explanation: S3 evidence foundation for S4 confirmation.
steps.dbImpact: Creates Folio + BillingModelTransitionRecord + PROFORMA Invoice.

steps.title: Record cancellation disclosure
steps.explanation: Required before placing a committed hold and confirming the reservation.
steps.dbImpact: Creates CancellationDisclosureRecord(entryId).

steps.title: Record advance payment (IN)
steps.explanation: Advance payment evidence to satisfy committed-hold and later gates.
steps.dbImpact: Creates PaymentRecord(stage=S3, direction=IN).

steps.title: Reconcile advance payment
steps.explanation: Marks advance payment reconciliation complete via service logic.
steps.dbImpact: Updates Folio.advancePaymentReconciliationComplete=true (and related payment reconciliation state).

steps.title: Place committed hold
steps.explanation: Committed hold is required before room assignment at S5 in this backend slice.
steps.dbImpact: Creates/updates CommittedHold + updates Room claim state + schedules W3.

steps.title: Confirm reservation (S3→S4)
steps.explanation: S4 confirmation snapshot + H1 creation + ownership assignment record.
steps.dbImpact: Creates Reservation; updates CommittedHold.CONFIRMED; creates H1 Handoff; writes CommunicationRecord + ACK timer; TraceEvents.

steps.title: Shim: activate S5 (simulate W4 pre-arrival activation)
steps.explanation: S4→S5 is timer/worker-driven in the SIG. This repo does not implement W4, so we simulate activation explicitly.
steps.dbImpact: Updates Entry.currentStage to S5.

steps.title: Accept H1 handoff
steps.explanation: Front desk accepts reservation handoff for pre-arrival execution.
steps.dbImpact: Updates HandoffRecord state/acceptedAt/acceptedBy.

steps.title: Assign a room at S5
steps.explanation: Room assignment sets up S7 stay exit gating later (occupied room required).
steps.dbImpact: Creates RoomAssignment; updates Room claim state where applicable.

steps.title: Fulfil H1 handoff
steps.explanation: H1 must be fulfilled before check-in (S5→S6).
steps.dbImpact: Updates HandoffRecord(H1) to FULFILLED with fulfilmentEvidence.

steps.title: Progress S5→S6
steps.explanation: Check-in initiation.
steps.dbImpact: Updates Entry.currentStage=S6; creates H2/H3 where applicable; closes H1 as needed.

steps.title: Verify guest identity
steps.explanation: S6→S7 gate requires identity verification.
steps.dbImpact: Updates GuestProfile verification fields; inserts TraceEvent for verification path.

steps.title: Progress S6→S7 (complete check-in)
steps.explanation: Completes check-in; folio converts to LIVE in canonical design (this repo uses existing S6 service behaviour).
steps.dbImpact: Updates Entry.currentStage=S7; writes key issuance + registration snapshot fields.

steps.title: Post a folio charge at S7
steps.explanation: S7 allows immutable folio line posting; corrections happen via offset lines.
steps.dbImpact: Inserts FolioLine(stage=S7).

steps.title: Shim: park other S7 entries for deterministic COMPLETE night audit
steps.explanation: Seed creates additional S7 ACTIVE entries that can cause PARTIAL night audit; we park them so the audit run is COMPLETE for this E2E entry.
steps.dbImpact: Updates Entry.status=PARKED for 2 other S7 ACTIVE entries.

steps.title: Run night audit
steps.explanation: Night audit is a gate for S7→S8 in this backend.
steps.dbImpact: Writes NightAuditRecord and potentially additional FolioLines.

steps.title: Shim: create H4 required for S7→S8
steps.explanation: S7→S8 checks H4 initiated; we create it if not present for this end-to-end run.
steps.dbImpact: Inserts HandoffRecord(H4, CREATED).

steps.title: Progress S7→S8
steps.explanation: Exits stay management into checkout & settlement stage.
steps.dbImpact: Updates Entry.currentStage=S8.

steps.title: Record key return
steps.explanation: S8 checkout evidence: keys returned.
steps.dbImpact: Inserts KeyReturnRecord.

steps.title: Record room inspection
steps.explanation: S8 checkout evidence: inspection captured.
steps.dbImpact: Inserts RoomInspectionRecord; may schedule timers (W9/W24) in canonical design.

steps.title: Initiate folio settlement
steps.explanation: Moves folio to SETTLED/OUTSTANDING depending on billing model and payment state.
steps.dbImpact: Updates Folio.state + emits settlement records if implemented.

steps.title: Fulfil H4 handoff
steps.explanation: S8 exit gate requires H4 fulfilled in this backend.
steps.dbImpact: Updates HandoffRecord(H4) to FULFILLED and stores fulfilmentEvidence.

steps.title: Progress S8→S9
steps.explanation: Entry moves into post-stay closure.
steps.dbImpact: Updates Entry.currentStage=S9.

steps.title: Shim: dispatch any remaining DRAFT invoices
steps.explanation: Closure gate requires invoices to be dispatched; this repo does not expose a full invoice dispatch controller for all invoice types in the S1→S9 path.
steps.dbImpact: Updates Invoice.state to DISPATCHED and sets dispatchedAt/dispatchedBy.

steps.title: Close entry at S9 (S9→CLOSED)
steps.explanation: Final closure after settlement readiness and required gates.
steps.dbImpact: Updates Entry.status=CLOSED + writes closure records (where implemented).
